Before opening:

1. Search existing issues — your bug may already be tracked.
2. Confirm the bug is in the framework itself or a reference module in this repo. Bugs in your own modules are not in scope here — see CONTRIBUTING.md.
3. If this is a security issue, do NOT open a public issue. See SECURITY.md.
4. If you need help debugging your specific deployment rather than reporting a defect, that is a paid engagement — see SUPPORT.md.

## Scope check

- [ ] I have not included secrets, tokens, or customer data
